subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Fans, ductwork and duct components that form part of an air-conditioning system or mechanical ventilation system must—

ol.li: separately comply with (2) to (12); or
achieve a fan motor input power per unit of flowrate lower than the fan motor input power per unit of flowrate achieved when applying (2) to (12) together.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Subject to (6), fans, other than roof mounted ventilation fans with cowlings, must have a peak efficiency, determined in accordance with Specification 46, of not less than, η min =a×ln(P)−b+N MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 ol.li: η min MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaeq4TdG2aaS baaSqaaiGac2gacaGGPbGaaiOBaaqabaaaaa@3AA1@ R0lGODlhHAAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAHAAYAAACO4SPqcvtD6OctNqLawhgc8x5XWZ8I2maV0qe LqMubDZ3Xrq9MhK6YsxL9HClRmx4yOmMt9zN1opKp5UCACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx5QUBAAcHRFNN VDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNv dXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0Jf QQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgAC AAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgSEtwNoAwAbAAALAQACAoJtAAIAgmkAAgCCbgAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0 aFR5cGUwMDP7PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVA NUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0 aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+ PG1pPiYjeDAzQjc7PC9taT48bXJvdz48bWk+bWluPC9taT48L21yb3c+PC9tc3ViPjwvbXJvdz48 L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGCAAAAAAAADs= = the minimum required peak system static efficiency for installation type A or C or the minimum peak system total efficiency for installation type B or D; and

P MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamiuaaaa@36CC@ R0lGODlhEAARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAARAAACHYSPqcvdAaMDAdVncWbX9BVBzjeR43SYnIS2 7msUACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxyQUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRp bWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0Qv QVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0 EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDUAAAAAAh/wtNYXRo VHlwZTAwM8E8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1 QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRo IHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bWk+UDwvbWk+PC9t YXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgIAAAAAAAA7 = the electrical input power of the fan (kW) at peak efficiency point, including any integrated motor control equipment; and

N MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOtaaaa@36CA@ R0lGODlhEgASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEgASAAACJISPqcvt74JEMsRkm82Gr314H8CJWNhdqXmu ash2EwrV9o03BQAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMckFAQAHB0RTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFn ZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIA CCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAP QPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAg04AAAAA If8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDPBPD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xh dG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAt LT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1pPk48 L21pPjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYEAAAA AAAAOw== = the minimum performance grade obtained from Table J6D5a; and

a MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyyaaaa@36DD@ R0lGODlhDQAOAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAADQAOAAACGISPqcscAeCSbx6ZcLSmKqohD+Q15ommBQAh /wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMckFAQAHB0RTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBO ZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAP R19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpf RF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAg2EAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUw MDPBPD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRo TUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxu cz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1pPmE8L21pPjwvbWF0aD48 IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYEAAAAAAAAOw== = regression coefficient a, obtained from Table J6D5b; and

b MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOyaaaa@36DE@ R0lGODlhDQASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAADQASAAACHYSPqcsb0Q6MYDZ7K07PbI98VehIpSdqKcW2 LlAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxyQUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRp bWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0Qv QVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0 EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDYgAAAAAh/wtNYXRo VHlwZTAwM8E8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1 QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRo IHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bWk+YjwvbWk+PC9t YXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgQAAAAAAAA7 = regression coefficient b, obtained from Table J6D5c; and

ln MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaciiBaiaac6 gaaaa@37DB@ R0lGODlhEQARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEQARAAACI4SPqcvd4VKAEdFqLr5wvuwBmnVwjJmd5bqg YutNXYjVdlQAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxzgUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdl cwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAI IS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A 9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgKCbAACAIJu AAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAzzzw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJh bnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJk KUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxt cm93PjxtaT5sbjwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh /wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYCAAAAAAAAOw== = natural logarithm.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Subject to (6), roof mounted ventilation fans with cowlings must—

ol.li:
where the electrical input power of the fan at peak efficiency point, including any integrated motor control equipment, is less than or equal to 30 kW, have peak efficiency, determined in accordance with Specification 46, of not less than, n minroof =0.062×In(P)+0.35 MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOBamaaBa aaleaaciGGTbGaaiyAaiaac6gacaWGYbGaam4Baiaad+gacaWGMbaa beaakiabg2da9iaaicdacaGGUaGaaGimaiaaiAdacaaIYaGaey41aq Raamysaiaad6gacaGGOaGaamiuaiaacMcacqGHRaWkcaaIWaGaaiOl aiaaiodacaaI1aaaaa@4C34@ mzp9CqAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx/wUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwAR BVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9F AAICgm0AAgCCaQACAIJuAAIAg3IAAgCDbwACAINvAAIAg2YAAAEBAAoCBIY9AD0CAFKIMAACAIIu AAIAiDAAAgCINgACAIgyAAIEhtcAtAIAg0kAAgCDbgACAIIoAAIAg1AAAgCCKQACBIYrACsCAIgw AAIAgi4AAgCIMwACAIg1AAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz/zw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/Pjwh LS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1M IDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgv TWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT5uPC9taT48bXJvdz48bWk+bWluPC9taT48bWk+ n minroof MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOBamaaBa aaleaaciGGTbGaaiyAaiaac6gacaWGYbGaam4Baiaad+gacaWGMbaa beaaaaa@3DB2@ R0lGODlhLgAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAALgAZAAACV4SPqcvtD6OctNqLs968+w8+QWCMIUSmp0gC 7bqYLty8b5zJiD2HamJLjXTDn6klO+pQM96xhGz2bsyfdFqCZnsSlTP7NVKKQ1fRHNRuaQwrW7F8 y+fsAgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMfgFAQAHB0RTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVU aW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9E L0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I 9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAg24AAwAbAAALAQAC AoJtAAIAgmkAAgCCbgACAINyAAIAg28AAgCDbwACAINmAAABAQAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM/88 P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIg KENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdo dHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bXN1Yj48bWk+bjwvbWk+ PG1yb3c+PG1pPm1pbjwvbWk+PG1pPnI8L21pPjxtaT5vPC9taT48bWk+bzwvbWk+PG1pPmY8L21p PjwvbXJvdz48L21zdWI+PC9tcm93PjwvbWEddGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4A If8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGCQAAAAAAADs= = the minimum required system static efficiency for installation type A or C or the minimum required system total efficiency for installation type B or D; and
P MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamiuaaaa@36CC@ R0lGODlhEAARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAARAAACHYSPqcvdAaMDAdVncWbX9BVBzjeR43SYnIS2 7msUACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxyQUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRp bWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0Qv QVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0 EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDUAAAAAAh/wtNYXRo VHlwZTAwM8E8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1 QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRo IHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bWk+UDwvbWk+PC9t YXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgIAAAAAAAA7 = the electrical input power of the fan (kW) at peak efficiency point, including any integrated motor control equipment; and
In MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamysaiaad6 gaaaa@37B8@ R0lGODlhEgASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEgASAAACI4SPqcvtD4OEKNBjr8lT5vVZIhMCHImd6Iat ZvulXarV9u0UACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxzgUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdl cwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAI IS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A 9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDSQACAINu AAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz2Dw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJh bnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJk KUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxt cm93PjxtaT5JPC9taT48bWk+bjwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1 QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYEAAAAAAAAOw== = natural logarithm; and

where the electrical input power of the fan at peak efficiency point, including any integrated motor control equipment, is greater than 30 kW—
have a peak system static efficiency of not less than 56% for installation type A or C; or
a peak system total efficiency of not less than 56% for installation type B or D.
individually, have a fan power ratio, determined in accordance with Specification 46, of less than 0.96; or
collectively, have an average fan power ratio, determined in accordance with Specification 46, of less than 0.96.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Where a fan’s electrical power input, including any integrated motor control equipment, at the peak efficiency point and full speed, is greater than 750 W—

ol.li: the fan must be capable of variable speed operation; and
where serving a single room or space, the fan must be capable of operating at reduced flow when conditions in the room or space served are within the temperature control deadband if applicable; and

where serving more than one room or space, the fan and the system it serves must—
be capable of variable volume operation; and
operate to a variable pressure to the extent practicable.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The requirements of (2) to (5) do not apply to fans—

ol.li: with electrical input power less than or equal to 125 W; or
that need to explosion proof; or
that are supply fans inside unitary air-conditioning equipment.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The pressure drop in the index run across all straight sections of rigid ductwork and all sections of flexible ductwork must not exceed 1 Pa/m when averaged over the entire length of straight rigid duct and flexible duct. The pressure drop of flexible ductwork sections may be calculated as if the flexible ductwork is laid straight.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Flexible ductwork must not account for more than 6 m total length in any duct run.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The upstream connection to ductwork fittings in the index run must have an equivalent diameter to the connected duct.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Turning vanes must be included in all rigid ductwork elbows with an angle of 90°, or more acute than 90°, in the index run except where—

ol.li: the inclusion of turning vanes presents a fouling risk; or
a long radius bend in accordance with AS 4254.2 is used.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: For ductwork components in the index run—

ol.li: the pressure drop across a coil must not exceed the value specified in Table J6D5d; and

a high efficiency particulate arrestance (HEPA) air filter must not exceed the higher of—
a pressure drop of 200 Pa when clean; or
the filter design pressure drop when clean at an air velocity of 1.5 m/s; and

any other air filter must not exceed—
the pressure drop specified in Table J6D5e when clean; or
the filter design pressure drop when clean at an air velocity of 2.5 m/s; and

the pressure drop across intake louvres, relief louvres and exhaust louvres must not exceed—
for single stage louvres, 30 Pa; and
for two stage louvres, 60 Pa; and
for acoustic louvres, 50 Pa; and
for other non-weatherproof louvres, 30 Pa; and

the pressure drop across a variable air volume box, with the damper in the fully open position, must not exceed—
for units with electric reheat, 100 Pa; and
for other units, 25 Pa not including coil pressure losses; and
rooftop cowls must not exceed a pressure drop of 30 Pa; and
attenuators must not exceed a pressure drop of 40 Pa; and
fire dampers must not exceed a pressure drop of 15 Pa when open; and
balancing and control dampers in the index run must not exceed a pressure drop of 25 Pa when in the fully open position; and
supply air diffusers and grilles must not exceed a pressure drop of 40 Pa; and
exhaust grilles must not exceed a pressure drop of 30 Pa; and
transfer ducts must not exceed a pressure drop of 12 Pa; and
door grilles and door undercuts must not exceed a pressure drop of 12 Pa; and
active chilled beams must not exceed a pressure drop of 150 Pa.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The requirements of (1) to (11) do not apply to—

ol.li: fans in unducted air-conditioning systems with a supply air capacity of less than 1000 L/s; and
fans which are dedicated solely to fire and smoke control; and
the power for process-related components; and
kitchen exhaust systems.

callout.p: For the purposes of (1)(b), fan motor input power per unit of flowrate may be calculated for air-conditioning systems and mechanical ventilation systems together.
